hero_desc:
EDTEC Academy Inc. was born in March 2025, as an entity rising against economic crisis of the former CCTSI Education Inc, which failed to operate due to internal theft, COVID 19, and typhoon devastations.

With 8(eight) TWSP batches of scholars and 5(five) paying batches of 90% to 100% passers for international assessment in CSS NCII, CCTSI founder is inspired to push-through the legacy, given its initial purpose of providing a venue for formal and non-formal education for the marginalized sector…

EDTEC Academy Inc., with the assistance of its new President, Joselito Jalandoni, is registered under SEC #2025040199006-61 dated April 23, 2025 and is now officially ready to serve the Filipinos and the marginalized seeking for technical skills and specialized education, countrywide.

EDTEC Academy Inc. now open its portals to the marginalized especially, women, agriculture, PWD, senior citizens, LGBT, and the cooperative sectors for competency-based learning and education.

EDTEC Academy Inc., amidst crisis will serve our citizenry to….
- Reach the marginalized sectors and equip them with low-cost education for personal and professional development;
- Enhance and upgrade employed and unemployed individuals’ special skills and competencies;
- Address graduates’ job displacement and unemployment through career guidance counseling; and
- Ensure skilled and quality graduates for the global industries.
mission_p:
To provide high-quality, hands-on technical and specialized education that bridges the gap between academic learning and industry demands. 

We strive to cultivate a skilled, adaptable workforce by fostering innovation, promoting lifelong learning, and partnering with industry stakeholders to ensure our training remains relevant and impactful.
vision_p: A leading channel of excellence in technical and specialized education, empowering individuals with industry-relevant skills, practical knowledge, and ethical values to drive innovation, enhance employability, and contribute meaningfully to sustainable economic development.

goals_p1:
1. Industry Aligned Curriculum
Develop and continuously update training programs in collaboration with industry leaders to reflect current technologies, tools, and workforce needs.
goals_p2:
2. Hands-On Learning Environment
Equip students with practical skills through state-of-the-art facilities, real-world projects, and internships that prepare them for immediate employment.
goals_p3:
3. Inclusive Access and Opportunity
Provide equitable access to vocational education for diverse populations, including underserved and marginalized communities.
goals_p4:
4. Faculty Excellence and Development
Recruit skilled instructors and invest in their ongoing professional development to ensure instructional quality and innovation.
goals_p5:
5. Strong Industry Partnerships
Build and maintain strategic relationships with businesses and industries to support job placement, apprenticeships, and technology transfer.
goals_p6:
6. Career and Entrepreneurship Support
Empower learners/trainees with not only technical expertise but also soft skills, career guidance, and entrepreneurial training to foster independence and adaptability.
goals_p7:
7. Quality Assurance and Continuous Improvement
Establish a culture of quality, accountability, and feedback to drive continuous improvement in all aspects of training and administration.
goals_p8:
8. Sustainability and Innovation
Integrate sustainable practices and promote innovation in training programs, facilities, and partnerships to future-proof education delivery.
tagline_title: Tagline: “Portum Voluntatis Cognitionem” (Knowledge of the Harbor of the Will)
tagline_p1: This tagline encapsulates the EDTEC’s mission to cultivate intentional learning, where knowledge is not just accumulated but anchored in the clarity of human purpose and directed by a conscious, disciplined will.
tagline_p2: “Knowledge” represents the pursuit of truth, understanding, and mastery — the core of all academic and intellectual endeavor.
tagline_p3: “Harbor” symbolizes a place of safety, reflection, and preparation — a secure space where learners are not only protected but also equipped for the voyage of life.
tagline_p4: “The Will” refers to the inner drive of individuals — the power of intention, determination, and ethical choice that directs action and gives meaning to knowledge.
tagline_p5: Together, the phrase suggests that “True education happens when the intellect is guided by purpose — when knowledge finds its grounding in the safe harbor of a disciplined and purposeful will”
